summary: Under cover of night, John Carter leads a small group to infiltrate Zodanga. They scale the massive carborundum walls using a human ladder. Carter successfully enters the palace grounds and begins coordinating the silent takeover of the city gates.
emotional_arc: Stealth/Tension $\rightarrow$ High Stakes Action $\rightarrow$ Calculated Control.
production_intent: Execute a high-stakes night infiltration of Zodanga. The sequence requires precise coordination between human and Thark actors to simulate the scaling of massive carborundum walls via a human ladder, transitioning from stealthy tension into controlled tactical movement within the palace grounds.
scene_short_description: A small group scales massive dark walls under moonlight to infiltrate a city.
scene_primary_scale_story_point: Massive verticality of carborundum walls vs. small character scale.
scene_start_state: Nighttime shadows at the base of the massive Zodanga walls.
scene_end_state: Carter standing within palace grounds, coordinating gate takeover.
dominant_action_line: Scaling the vertical wall via human ladder to reach the palace interior.
scene_spatial_layout: Vertical ascent from ground level to wall summit
character_spatial_map: john_carter at the apex of the climbing group

beat_transition_map: BT002 -> BT003: Transition from climbing to ground coordination

storyboard_markdown:
# Scene Contract: CH024_SC005

## Production Intent
Execute a high-stakes night infiltration of Zodanga. The sequence requires precise coordination between human and Thark actors to simulate the scaling of massive carborundum walls via a human ladder, transitioning from stealthy tension into controlled tactical movement within the palace grounds.

## Required Cast
- john_carter
- Small Group of Tharks

## Required Environments
- zodanga_walled_city (The Walls/Palace Grounds)

## Continuity Constraints
- Moonlight direction and shadow consistency
- Height scale of carborundum walls relative to characters
- Physical placement and stability of the human ladder elements

## Beat List
- BT001: Formation of the human ladder at the wall base
- BT002: The vertical ascent and infiltration
- BT003: Establishing control within palace grounds
